To Set Aside Defts Ccp998 Offer And Judgment Or In The Alternative To Reform
Off Calendar Apr-14-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nancy G. Cerreta, Esq. of DRYDEN, MARGOLES 362-6715, for defendants Albert
Kenneth Strane and Julie Shields, moving To Set Aside Defts Ccp998 Offer And
Judgment Or In The Alternative To Reform
Thomas D. Lininger, Esq., 916/962-0253, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as revised -- DEFENDANTs
ALBERT KENNETH STRANE and Julie Shields' motion To Set Aside Defts Ccp998 Offer And
Judgment Or In The Alternative To Reform -- Granted to set aside defendants Ccp998
Offer And Judgment. The Court further awarded attorney's fees to plaintiff in the
amount of $3,500. Plaintiff is to prepare and order. (PHA/301/EH) Reporter: Robert
Balian, CSR #5220
